summary: List Project assignments for a Company User
description: This endpoint returns the current and potential Project assignments for the specified User. This includes Project information, as well as the Permission Template and Roles assigned to a given user when they are assigned on a Project.

parameters.name: filters[active]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) with a status of 'active'.

parameters.name: filters[by_stage]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified project stage ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[by_type]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified project type ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[by_program]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified project program ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[by_region]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified project region ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[by_status]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified status value. Must be one of Active, Inactive, or All.

parameters.name: filters[project_roles]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the Project Role ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[project_permission_templates]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the Project Permissions Template ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[assignment_status]
parameters.description: Filters projects to those matching the given assignment status.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort the results by the specified field.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sort direction. Default is ascending, nulls first.

is_assigned.description: Whether user is assigned to project or not

active.description: Whether the project is active or not

roles.description: Array of user project role names

items.description: Name of the role user is assigned to in the project

permission_template_name.description: Project currently assigned user permission template name

project_type.description: Project type assigned to the project
